improvement: Added a fail-closed Cloudflare evidence acceptance builder that composes the Frontier verification-input adapter with the evidence acceptance gate while preserving raw verifier statuses.

verification.runtime: isolated Node runtime with byte-identical committed source and dependencies
cases: all explicit provenance and claim checks accepted
claim rejection kept distinct from provenance rejection

limits: The builder does not perform cryptographic signature verification.
The deployment workflow does not yet generate the real verification-input manifest or invoke this builder.
Cloudflare deployment remains blocked until required environment credentials are configured and a workflow run returns a deployment URL.
falsification_route: Any missing or ambiguous verifier status is accepted.
Claim failure is reported as provenance success and overall acceptance.
The committed test fails in CI or a clean checkout.
privacy_boundary: No credentials, private chat, health data, or secret values are recorded.
